action_set_definitions.name: get_site_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current grid status (mapping of coordinates to status and depth) and the discovery registry (list of historical landmarks and artifacts).

action_set_definitions.name: verify_historical_coordinates
action_set_definitions.description: Cross-references legacy coordinate systems with modern standards using specific masonry landmarks to ensure high-precision spatial reconciliation.

landmark_ids.description: A list of masonry landmark IDs found in the discovery registry.

action_set_definitions.name: get_workforce_status
action_set_definitions.description: Returns a mapping of all field units/teams to their current grid location and active tasking.

action_set_definitions.name: get_environmental_data
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves environmental factors, including weather conditions and equipment health status.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_excavation_operation
action_set_definitions.description: Synchronously deploys a team to a grid unit to excavate to a specified depth. This action updates the environment state immediately upon execution.

team_name.description: The name of the unit to be deployed.

grid_id.description: The coordinate ID of the target grid unit.

target_depth.description: The depth in meters to be achieved.

state_description.grid_status: A map where keys are grid coordinates (e.g., 'A1') and values track status ('unexplored', 'in-progress', 'completed') and depth reached.
state_description.team_assignments: Mapping of team names to their current grid location and active task.
state_description.discovery_registry: A list of artifacts or significant soil samples found during the simulation.
state_description.environmental_factors: Current conditions affecting work speed, such as weather and equipment health.

discovery_registry.description: Historical notes identifying Masonry_Marker_North, South, and West as the primary control points for the temple grid baseline.
